surface_verification.justification: Pure client render-TIMING change: a new data-independent trailing-repaint module (activation-repaint.ts) wired by useTerminalResize.ts on tab-activation + visibility/focus. NO server/API/store/WS/contract/Vite-config/CORS/proxy surface touched, so the Backend-affects-Frontend rule does not force surface=web and the feedback_browser_fixes_need_real_browser_smoke trigger (infra diff) does not apply. The broken React-effect wiring is exercised end-to-end at the integration level via renderHook in useTerminalResize.repaint.test.ts (real hook, fake timers, asserts term.refresh fires on an IDLE activation/focus) + the pure module in activation-repaint.test.ts. The only behavior left is the actual VISUAL smear-clearing on a real GPU/compositor, which is requires-physical-device (headless Chromium WebGL != user GPU) and is user-confirmed UAT on rebuild.

degraded.reason: requires-physical-device (real-GPU/compositor); user agreed to visual UAT after rebuild+restart

behaviors.behavior: AC-1: an IDLE Transcript->Terminal switch (no writes, same pane size) schedules data-independent trailing repaints
behaviors.evidence: useTerminalResize.repaint.test.ts 'tab activation schedules data-independent trailing repaints (idle, no writes)' (RED-verified: fails when schedule() removed)

behaviors.behavior: AC-2: window focus / visibilitychange / pageshow restore schedules the same data-independent trailing repaints
behaviors.evidence: useTerminalResize.repaint.test.ts 'window focus schedules data-independent trailing repaints' (RED-verified)

behaviors.behavior: AC-3a: each scheduled pass is a full-viewport refresh (0, rows-1), one per configured delay (130/350 ms)
behaviors.evidence: activation-repaint.test.ts 'repaints the full viewport once per delay when the timers fire'

behaviors.behavior: AC-3b: re-scheduling cancels the prior in-flight set (no stacking on rapid re-activation)
behaviors.evidence: activation-repaint.test.ts 're-scheduling cancels the prior in-flight set (no stacking)'

behaviors.behavior: AC-3c: pending passes are cancelled on clear()/unmount
behaviors.evidence: activation-repaint.test.ts 'clear() cancels all pending passes' + useTerminalResize.repaint.test.ts 'trailing repaints are cancelled on unmount'

behaviors.behavior: AC-3d: disposal guards — schedule() no-ops when disposed; a pass firing after disposal or after the term ref is nulled does not repaint or throw
behaviors.evidence: activation-repaint.test.ts 'schedule() queues nothing when already disposed' + 'a pass that fires AFTER disposal...' + 'a pass that fires after the term is gone...'

behaviors.behavior: AC-4: no visible input-area/glyph smear after an IDLE tab switch on the user's real GPU
behaviors.reason: WebGL partial-dirty smear over a real GPU/compositor after a display:none->block un-hide reproduces only on real hardware; headless Chromium WebGL is not representative. User-confirmed visual UAT on rebuild.
